name: Pizza Sandwiches
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pizza sauce by sautéing onion, celery, and green pepper in oil until tender and translucent.
2. Add canned tomatoes, tomato paste, oregano, sweet basil, salt, pepper, and rosemary (if using) to the sautéed vegetables. Cook over low heat on the stove top for approximately 30 minutes, stirring occasionally. Yield: about 1 1/2 cups of sauce.
3. Prepare the sandwiches by mixing equal parts pizza sauce and cottage cheese (each 2 tablespoons).
4. Spread the mixture onto half of a toasted English muffin.
5. Sprinkle grated Parmesan cheese over the top.
6. Place the sandwiches under the broiler in the oven until the Parmesan cheese turns golden, approximately 5 minutes. Yield: 12 pizza sandwiches, about 136 calories per serving.
